compiled_state.title: Remove Bash from bot-psychologist.md frontmatter to enforce read-only contract at capability level
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description: bot-psychologist.md lists Bash in its tools frontmatter despite the agent's stated contract of not modifying code. Removing Bash and retaining only Read/Glob/Grep would enforce the read-only contract at the capability level rather than relying solely on prompt instructions.

comments.body: SAFEGUARD DEFERRED: requires editing plugins/dso/agents/bot-psychologist.md, deferred by user.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
